claim_summary: Repository implements an end-to-end pipeline joining preprocessing proxy-state construction predictive modeling and causal analysis
allowed_wording: The repository contains implemented components for the end-to-end pipeline.
wording_to_avoid: The repository proves all stages were executed end to end.
validation_needed: Confirm which orchestrator was used for final runs.
notes: Multiple workflow versions coexist.

claim_summary: PhysioNet and MIMIC preprocessing produce a canonical time-series outcome identifier contract
allowed_wording: The code defines a processed [ts, oc, ts_ids] contract.
wording_to_avoid: The final processed datasets are archived in the repository.
validation_needed: Archive or document processed-pickle hashes and exact source data.
notes: Processed pickles are referenced by absolute paths but not present.

claim_summary: STraTS GRU GRU-D TCN and SAnD are implemented and have final archived predictive summaries for both datasets
allowed_wording: Archived summaries are available for STraTS, GRU, GRU-D, TCN, and SAnD on both datasets.
wording_to_avoid: All implemented models including InterpNet produced final results.
validation_needed: Confirm approved run and archive manifest.
notes: 10 final predictive training summaries were found.

claim_summary: Predictive metrics by dataset and supported model are available in training_summary.txt artifacts
allowed_wording: The training summaries report validation and test metrics for each archived predictive run.
wording_to_avoid: Prediction export files are performance summaries.
validation_needed: Build a checked predictive metrics table from all 10 exact summaries.
notes: Examples listed; all model summaries are inventoried in experiment_inventory.csv.

claim_summary: InterpNet is implemented in code and wrappers but final outputs are missing
allowed_wording: InterpNet appears implemented but no final archived InterpNet output was found.
wording_to_avoid: InterpNet underperformed or failed.
validation_needed: Search external output locations or mark as missing.
notes: Do not infer failure from absence.

claim_summary: Prediction exports contain patient-level proxy-state probabilities and thresholded binary tags
allowed_wording: Prediction exports are patient-level predicted proxy-state tables.
wording_to_avoid: Prediction exports are model performance tables.
validation_needed: Confirm predict_split and thresholding for every archived export.
notes: Wrapper commands show predict_split all, but archive copy provenance incomplete.

claim_summary: Rule-based proxy states were generated for MIMIC and PhysioNet
allowed_wording: Rule-based proxy-state tag tables are archived for both datasets.
wording_to_avoid: The tags are verified diagnoses.
validation_needed: Create reviewed proxy-definition table from source rules.
notes: MIMIC has richer validation outputs than PhysioNet.

claim_summary: MIMIC rule-based proxy-state prevalence is available
allowed_wording: MIMIC proxy-state prevalence was summarized in the archive.
wording_to_avoid: Prevalence proves clinical validity.
validation_needed: Check proxy definitions and explain zero-positive chronic burden row.
notes: Exact numerical prevalence claims must cite this CSV.

claim_summary: MIMIC mortality by proxy state is association evidence not causal evidence
allowed_wording: Mortality differs by proxy-state tag in an unadjusted association table.
wording_to_avoid: Proxy tags cause mortality differences.
validation_needed: Inspect NaN fields and phrase as association only.
notes: Not available as equivalent PhysioNet table in final tree archive.

claim_summary: Majority-vote proxy states were generated and used by all final causal runs
allowed_wording: The causal runs used majority-vote proxy-state tables.
wording_to_avoid: The majority vote is clinical consensus truth.
validation_needed: Archive or identify exact voter input files.
notes: Run summaries reference voter directories by absolute path.

claim_summary: Dataset-specific DAGs were generated for causal adjustment
allowed_wording: Dataset-specific DAG artifacts were generated and used by matching/CATE stages.
wording_to_avoid: The DAG was learned from data or proves identification.
validation_needed: Visual inspect DAGs and confirm advisor-approved assumptions.
notes: Graph pickles not deserialized.

claim_summary: Confounder selection is DAG-guided and restricted to observed available variables
result_source: observed_confounders columns in CATE and matching summaries
allowed_wording: The pipeline uses DAG-derived observed adjustment sets.
wording_to_avoid: All confounding is controlled.
validation_needed: Check treatment-specific confounder analysis for selected results.
notes: Missing graph candidates and unmeasured confounding remain limitations.

claim_summary: Matching results are available as matched-pair baseline summaries
allowed_wording: Matched-pair baseline summaries are available for successful treatments.
wording_to_avoid: Matching estimates are ATEs.
validation_needed: Use ATT-style or matched-pair wording and support diagnostics.
notes: 30 deduplicated rows; 8 failure rows.

claim_summary: Some matching baselines are missing because no binary matching columns were available
allowed_wording: Matching failed for some treatments because required binary matching columns were unavailable.
wording_to_avoid: Missing matching means zero effect.
validation_needed: Verify summary_results.txt for any cited failure.
notes: Failure is diagnostic/support limitation.

claim_summary: CATE estimation outputs are available for all 12 causal run families
allowed_wording: CATE summaries are available for all dataset estimator sampling combinations.
wording_to_avoid: The table proves clinical causal effects.
validation_needed: Resolve primary estimator/sampling and exact estimand wording.
notes: 114 treatment-level rows loaded.

claim_summary: CausalForest and LinearDML have sensitivity and permutation diagnostics
allowed_wording: Forest and LinearDML runs include sensitivity and permutation diagnostic artifacts.
wording_to_avoid: Diagnostics prove causal identification.
validation_needed: Inspect selected benchmark reports and permutation warnings.
notes: Representative logs show partial statuses in analysis stage.

claim_summary: PFN CATE runs intentionally lack sensitivity analysis and permutation tests
allowed_wording: PFN CATE outputs exist, but sensitivity and permutation stages were skipped by design.
wording_to_avoid: PFN failed or showed no sensitivity concern.
validation_needed: Quote run_summary skip reason if needed.
notes: Do not treat missing PFN diagnostics as negative results.

claim_summary: Estimator comparison artifacts exist but do not by themselves select a primary estimator
allowed_wording: Cross-estimator comparison artifacts summarize differences across estimators.
wording_to_avoid: The best estimator is selected by the archive.
validation_needed: Advisor decision on estimator role.
notes: PFN lacks downstream diagnostics.

claim_summary: Original and downsampled causal runs are both available but represent different analyzed populations
allowed_wording: Original and downsampled runs should be presented as distinct analyses.
wording_to_avoid: Downsampled and original estimates are interchangeable.
validation_needed: Advisor decision on primary sampling design.
notes: Numbered configs missing; folder labels and outcome rates support distinction.

claim_summary: Overlap support evidence is indirect and mostly comes from matching support fields
allowed_wording: The archive contains indirect support diagnostics such as match rates and failures.
wording_to_avoid: Positivity is proven.
validation_needed: Search for dedicated overlap diagnostics or add limitation.
notes: No dedicated overlap plot family found.

claim_summary: Sensitivity benchmark summaries are available for non-PFN runs
allowed_wording: Sensitivity diagnostics are available for selected non-PFN estimates.
wording_to_avoid: Sensitivity analysis eliminates unmeasured confounding.
validation_needed: Inspect per-treatment reports and control messages before numeric claims.
notes: Some treatments have partial analysis status and missing contours.

claim_summary: Permutation diagnostic summaries are available for non-PFN runs
allowed_wording: Permutation diagnostics were generated for forest and linear runs.
wording_to_avoid: Permutation tests prove causal validity.
validation_needed: Confirm trial counts seeds and warnings for cited rows.
notes: PFN skipped by design.

claim_summary: Final results contain conflicting or misleading duplicate summary filenames
allowed_wording: Some CATE summary filenames are inconsistent and require careful selection.
wording_to_avoid: All summary filenames are authoritative.
validation_needed: Use selected_cate_summary_path from inventory and avoid manager duplicates.
notes: Documented in unresolved questions.

claim_summary: The final result archive is ignored and untracked so reproducibility requires an additional manifest
allowed_wording: The archive is locally present but ignored and untracked; a manifest is needed for reproducible citation.
wording_to_avoid: The results are fully versioned in Git.
validation_needed: Create checksums and archival pointer before final thesis submission.
notes: This is a blocking Stage 3 evidence-citation issue.

claim_summary: Final causal run summaries use absolute external paths and missing numbered configs
allowed_wording: Run summaries provide strong execution provenance but reference external absolute paths and missing configs.
wording_to_avoid: The archive alone is sufficient to reproduce every run.
validation_needed: Archive configs or document path remapping.
notes: Absolute /truenas paths are provenance facts, not portable commands.

claim_summary: Dedicated overlap plots or propensity-support diagnostics are not present
allowed_wording: Dedicated overlap diagnostics were not found in the audited archive.
wording_to_avoid: The study has complete overlap diagnostics.
validation_needed: Decide whether to generate in later stage if allowed.
notes: Stage 2 did not regenerate results.
